overview: The bird is a Ruffed Grouse (Bonasa umbellus). This medium-sized game bird is recognized by its mottled, camouflaged plumage and a small crest on its head. The image captures a male displaying, a behavior used to attract females by creating a thumping sound known as "drumming". They are the most widely distributed game bird in North America, often found in forested uplands. Wikipedia +5 6 sites Ruffed grouse - Wikipedia
